category_sources: source_facts.description says library for reading and writing H264 video streams; official GitHub README describes reading and writing H.264 bitstreams.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub repository use h264bitstream.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the current documentation surface; it includes build, example code, API notes, and Doxygen generation instructions.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page states the project is now on GitHub at https://github.com/aizvorski/h264bitstream; official GitHub README lists the same homepage.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify a C library and CLI tool for H.264 video bitstreams.
